5.1.20.1 Floor
Function Description
Obtains the minimum integer value less than or equal to x, that is, rounding
towards negative infinity. Examples:
Floor(3.9) = 3.0
Floor(-3.9) = -4.0

1 Ascend C APIs
Ascend C provides a group of class library APIs. You can use the standard C++
syntax and class library APIs for programming. Ascend C programming class library
